causal_read.mechanism: The same author jointly chooses a broad question and a maximum of four points; the question often entails obligations beyond the selected point set.

next_structural_hypothesis.name: POINT_FIRST_THEN_SCOPE_BOUND_QUESTION
upstream_to_downstream: Select two to four support-bound obligations first, with versioned facet definitions and no question yet.
Validate claim/support/facet closure before question generation.
Generate a Spanish field question from only the accepted obligations and require exact scope equivalence.
Cross-provider screen on a wholly new cohort excluding S194, S195 and S197.
Open the planner only after zero invalid, unsupported, wrong-facet or incomplete items.
anti_overfit: Do not retry, repair or rescore the S197 cohort.
Do not add manufacturer, product or observed-question rules.
Freeze generic facet definitions and scope-closure gates before selecting the next cohort.
